architecturePrinciples: Ecosystem-first: shared types, one JSON SoT, optional Supabase overlay — never fork parallel roadmap trackers.
Realtime-first where the product promises live state; degrade with explicit UX, not silent stubs.
Cloud SoT for data that must be authoritative across devices; repository JSON for editorial readiness until CI writes snapshots.
Modular boundaries: AION Driver is one client module; portal and Core/Link stay decoupled from driver-only hacks.

Parallel execution: внешние блокеры (EAS queue, deploy, review) не замораживают весь цикл — честно фиксировать в blockedTasks/feed и продолжать следующий actionable шаг по стеку (2–9) без fake done для APK.
aiExecutionNotes.noFakeDoneRule: Never mark fully_done without releaseQualityBar + definitionOfDone in JSON and verified production paths.
aiExecutionNotes.finishBeforeSwitchingRule: Complete the current subsystem or epic slice before switching unless the user explicitly rescopes — except when the slice is blocked only by an external wait (EAS, network, review): then document the blocker and continue parallel actionable work without claiming the blocked slice done.
aiExecutionNotes.noPlaceholderUx: No TODO shells in user-visible flows; ship disabled states with copy or hide behind feature flags.
aiExecutionNotes.noDisconnectedSystems: UI must call real modules/services; no orphan screens without data contract.
aiExecutionNotes.noDuplicateLogic: Extend existing helpers/repos; do not copy-paste second parsers or merge trees.
aiExecutionNotes.ecosystemFirstArchitecture: Prefer changes that improve cohesion: shared env, typed payloads, one merge path in ecosystem-data.
aiExecutionNotes.cloudSourceOfTruthPolicy: When Supabase snapshots exist (portal_ecosystem, portal_roadmap_master), they overlay repo JSON; document conflicts instead of guessing.
aiExecutionNotes.realtimeFirstDirection: Favor durable channels, backoff, and observable health for sync/realtime; measure before claiming readiness %.
releaseQualityRequirements: Manual acceptance on primary flows before production channel bumps.
Known P0/P1 must have owner + date or remain blocked in execution queue.
OTA vs APK policy respected: native bumps only via APK when requiresApk applies.

chatgpt: Architecture and tradeoffs: review subsystem boundaries, risk, and sequencing.
Strategy: reconcile epics with execution queue and cloud constraints.
Ecosystem review: challenge fake completeness and suggest consolidation.
cursor: Parallel while blocked: если P1 APK ждёт FINISHED EAS — не idle: nextRecommendedStep по background-drive / floating-orb / Link / profit / sync; APK остаётся P1 до device-verified.

Continuous execution: каждый цикл начинать с roadmap-execution + ecosystem-status (blockers, techDebt, validationMatrix) и брать верхний пункт глобального стека приоритетов: (1) APK release loop до device-verified, (2) Android background runtime production, (3) floating orb overlay, (4) Link relay, (5) live profit, (6) device registry+realtime, (7) cloud sync intelligence, (8–9) UX/visual polish.
Implementation: code against roadmap-execution + ecosystem-status SoT.
Integration: wire APIs, merge JSON, tests, and portal surfaces.
Refactor: remove duplication while preserving behavior contracts.

trustedFullyDoneRequires: Реализовано в коде и проверено вручную на основных потоках
Отражено в ecosystem-implementation-feed.json (событие) или явно отмечено почему нет
Нет открытых P0/P1 по подсистеме без плана в executionQueue
Валидация: web_build passed для изменений портала; для client — согласованный gate в репо клиента
collaborationWorkflow: 0) При FINISHED Android preview: `aion-com` → `npm run release:apk-manifest:sync <buildId>` (или workflow apk-manifest-from-eas) → commit манифеста → деплой портала → device check.
2) Cursor выбирает задачу по executionQueue и nextRecommendedStep подсистемы.

2b) Внешний блокер только по ожиданию (EAS FINISHED, сеть, deploy, review): зафиксировать честно; не останавливать цикл — переключаться на следующий actionable пункт стека (2–9) без fake done для APK.
3) При неясной архитектуре — запрос к ChatGPT с приложенными JSON срезами.
4) После merge: npm run feed:append (или правка ecosystem-implementation-feed.json) + обновление lastUpdated в ecosystem-status при смене readiness.
5) ChatGPT сверяет против trustedFullyDoneRequires перед тем как согласовать «done».

executionQueue.currentActiveEpic: Always-on drive: background shift + live profit + two-phone Link relay
executionQueue.nextImplementationTarget: P1 APK остаётся: ждать FINISHED b9d3c90a → sync манифест → deploy → device Update Center (лёгкий poll, не idle всего цикла). Параллельно: production Android background (не только experimental), затем overlay orb / Link relay / profit по nextRecommendedStep подсистем.
blockedTasks: APK 1.0.4/6: активный preview EAS b9d3c90a-7566-425a-bdb9-53d68f59593a (commit 9baa6bb, vc6) — ждать FINISHED → `npm run release:apk-manifest:sync b9d3c90a-7566-425a-bdb9-53d68f59593a` → commit манифест → деплой портала → Update Center на устройстве; старые IN_QUEUE (f71cec0a/9fa827ce) можно отменить
Полная схема release DB без согласования миграций и RLS
Портальный auth для приватных feeds без UX входа
releaseBlockers: Release DB + RLS undecided — blocks device registry and signed rollout truth
uxBlockers: Incomplete edge states on primary Driver flows (see subsystem extensions)
Portal lacks authenticated account center — public-only ops
backendBlockers: Typed repos for roadmap write path from CI not landed
Link cloud pairing lacks stable realtime contract
